narrative:
Precinct Jefferson/Madison (precinct in Guernsey County) has 665 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.2 percentage points.
